'''Parshoone''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], controlled by the [[Imperial Remnant]]. It was an [[Ubiqtorate/Legends|Ubiqtorate]] contact station.

Parshoone was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Isila Drutch]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

{{Planet-stub}}
